Localization.Description: Multiple second authentication factor requests in Multifactor. This may indicate an attempt by attackers, who obtained the user's credentials, to push the user to confirm the login.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: {count.subevents} second authentication factor requests from host {external_src.ip} were sent to user {subject.account.contact}
User {subject.account.contact} confirmed login after {count.subevents} second authentication factor requests from host {external_src.ip}
User {subject.account.contact} confirmed login after {count.subevents} second authentication factor requests from host {external_src.ip}. Internal address {assigned_src_ip} was obtained.
